scripts.check:node: node -e "const major=Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if(major!==24){console.error('Bliver requires Node.js 24.x; found '+process.version); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.render-build: npm run check:node && npm --prefix backend ci --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix frontend ci --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix frontend run build
